hero.titleSuffix: Right in the Heart of Saigon
hero.subtitle: Step into neon-lit Bangkok alleys, where steaming woks of stir-fried noodles and fiery, addictive flavors are always waiting for you.

featured.label: SIGNATURE MAIN DISH
featured.name: Pad Thai Jai Yen
featured.desc: Traditional Thai stir-fried noodles with fresh shrimp, tofu, bean sprouts and a signature sweet-and-sour tamarind sauce. An icon of Bangkok street food.

sideCards.title: Charcoal-Grilled Skewers
sideCards.desc: Skewered meat grilled over glowing charcoal

sideCards.title: Thai Milk Tea
sideCards.desc: Rich, creamy and fragrant Thai milk tea

promo.title: Special Offer
promo.desc: Get a free Thai milk tea when you book a table for 4 or more

items.name: Tom Yum Goong
items.desc: A hot and sour Thai soup with fresh shrimp, lemongrass, galangal and kaffir lime leaves.

items.name: Som Tam
items.desc: Shredded green papaya salad tossed with chili, garlic, roasted peanuts and a tangy fish sauce dressing.

items.name: Pad Krapow Moo
items.desc: Minced pork stir-fried with fiery Thai basil, served with a fried egg and steamed rice.

items.name: Gai Yang
items.desc: Charcoal-grilled chicken marinated with lemongrass and turmeric, served with a tangy tamarind dip.

items.name: Larb Moo
items.desc: Minced pork tossed with toasted rice powder, lime, dried chili and fragrant Thai herbs.

items.name: Mango Sticky Rice
items.desc: Soft, fragrant sticky rice served with ripe mango and rich coconut cream.

space.title: Feel the "Bangkok Vibe"
space.subtitle: A vibrant, buzzing space that channels the energy of Thailand's capital
space.caption: Streets Lit Up

testimonials.title: What Guests Say About Siam Flavors
testimonials.ctaGoogle: See all reviews on Google Maps

items.quote: The Pad Thai here genuinely tastes like the night markets in Bangkok. Not too sweet, the tamarind sauce is rich, and the shrimp is incredibly fresh.
items.name: Minh Lan

items.quote: The decor has real taste, the orange neon lighting makes the food look even more irresistible. Definitely coming back with friends!
items.name: Tran Hoang

contact.title: Find Us
contact.address: 123 Neon Street, Da Kao Ward, District 1, Ho Chi Minh City

footer.tagline: Authentic Thai flavors - Served with heart.
